title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-18 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Executive summary (for PM)

  • Run tier: B (timeboxed)—44 in-scope Stories under HRREC-82977 after excluding doc-writer AG:/RN: keys; theme-based Salomon/DA and batched Dev lens; not full per-key Salomon depth.
  • Gap Likelihood reflects Verdict + suggested missing BDD only—not a separate persona-tension score. Skipped gap table keys: HRREC-90852 (AG:), HRREC-90853 (RN:).
  • XO MCP did not return SUV metadata this session (transport error on search), so Dev lens rows are engineering follow-up questions, not proof of missing metadata.

Top 5 gaps (epic)

  • Thin-spec and cross-team spikes (notably My Conversations / OE packaging) sit beside UI-heavy stories—sequence dependencies before hard QA dates (HRREC-92022).
  • Draft lifecycle is explicitly local-only; navigation discard and refresh stories must be trained together or recruiters will perceive data loss as bugs (HRREC-91995, HRREC-91996).
  • Merge, email-change pause, and thread visibility interact—risk of contradictory UX if duplicate-management events arrive out of order (HRREC-92015, HRREC-92005).
  • Reporting + purge + candidate communications visibility must agree on attachment redaction and timestamps—milestone regression story is exploratory only today (HRREC-92035, HRREC-92011, HRREC-92013).
  • Notification entry points (My Conversations vs bell vs email prompts) need tenant-aligned language; internal KB stresses domain alignment for conversational channels (HRREC-91975).

Top 5 strengths (epic)

  • Most functional slices carry detailed Given/When/Then blocks already—strong refinement investment across compose, send, and error paths.
  • Agency vs non-agency branching is explicitly split across tabs, compose, and isolation stories—reduces accidental scope bleed.
  • Security read vs send split is called out with REST notes on HRREC-91979—good engineering handoff signal.
  • Attachment and validation stories distinguish client vs server responsibilities—helps QA plan negative paths.
  • Admin enable/disable and lifecycle admin stories show rollout-aware thinking for enterprise tenants.

Epic-level notes

  • Overlapping UI chrome: HRREC-91948, HRREC-91980, HRREC-92001, and HRREC-91982 all touch expand/grow—keep a single measurement source of truth in design specs.
  • HRREC-91994 and HRREC-92036 should share send/polling semantics; dedupe QA matrices.
  • HRREC-92013 is exploratory—tie to concrete report names before milestone sign-off.

Cross-initiative pattern hints (WhatsApp — inspiration only)

Frozen pattern corpus — 2026-05-16 companion snapshot in repo; No live Jira pull for WhatsApp companion this run (manifest-only). Theme anchors below cite snapshot excerpt keys only—inspiration for email, not requirements.

Same candidate profile sliding side panel UX shell as WhatsApp work; not a requirements import; channel and backend differ; do not treat WhatsApp defects as proof email is broken.

  • Preview vs send — HRREC-84403 / HRREC-89856: consider for 2WE if email preview hydration could diverge from what actually sends when CRF scope or processing user differs?
  • Merge / identity — HRREC-90306: consider for 2WE if merge could mis-attribute outbound email identity or threading after duplicate resolution?
  • Composer guard — HRREC-90268 / HRREC-92062: consider for 2WE if double-send or typing-while-send races need the same in-flight disable pattern on email send?
  • Lifecycle messaging — HRREC-90243: consider for 2WE if closed-thread or disposition banners should appear at the business event, not only after first outbound?
  • Reporting field naming — HRREC-84556: consider for 2WE if mixed-channel dashboards need explicit email fields so SMS-oriented labels are not reused?
StoryGap LikelihoodPM lensQA lensDev lensVerdictSuggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)
HRREC-91946
[Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only)		 Very LowGrey

Gap Likelihood from Verdict + column 7 only.

 The SSP email task should appear in the right order with icon and tooltip once other side-panel tasks are visible; confirm final header copy with design before sign-off. [Functional knowledge: CONTEXT.md; Salomon; DA] Recruiters could see the task but land on the wrong job application context if ordering drifts from other tasks—exercise ordering with SMS and notes tasks. [Jira] HRREC-91946 ([Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only)): XO metadata search was attempted this session but the SUV search endpoint returned a transport error, so confirm REST tasks, conversation security domains, and sliding-panel bindings on a healthy SUV before sizing. [XO MCP]

⚪ Very Low

  • Finding: HRREC-91946: Jira scenarios for this slice are detailed enough to drive build and QA for the stated MVP boundary.
  • Recommended next step: No material gap surfaced in this Tier B pass—keep Jira as source of truth unless new routing or security rules land.

No additional BDD suggested for HRREC-91946 in this Tier B pass—Jira scenarios cover the primary path unless REST or security contracts shift.
HRREC-91948
[Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion		 Very LowGrey

Gap Likelihood from Verdict + column 7 only.

 Wide-panel growth must stay consistent with other side-panel tasks so recruiters are not surprised by width or shadow when email is not open. [Functional knowledge: CONTEXT.md; Salomon; DA] Wide panel regressions on smaller breakpoints may clip email headers—spot-check L vs M breakpoints against Figma. [Jira] HRREC-91948 ([Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion): XO metadata search was attempted this session but the SUV search endpoint returned a transport error, so confirm REST tasks, conversation security domains, and sliding-panel bindings on a healthy SUV before sizing. PH: Recruiter sees Empty state of email task if opened		 Very LowGrey

Gap Likelihood from Verdict + column 7 only.

 First-open empty state needs clear next step and naming alignment for the conversational email header so recruiters know how to start a thread. [Functional knowledge: CONTEXT.md; Salomon; DA] If Compose and New both appear, mis-clicks could start duplicate drafts—watch empty-state focus order and keyboard traps. [Jira] HRREC-91974 (PH: Recruiter sees Empty state of email task if opened): XO metadata search was attempted this session but the SUV search endpoint returned a transport error, so confirm REST tasks, conversation security domains, and sliding-panel bindings on a healthy SUV before sizing. HRREC-91975
PH: Recruiter receives a notification		 MediumBlue

Gap Likelihood from Verdict + column 7 only.

 Inbound replies should surface where busy recruiters already look; align story language with tenant notification routing and training so email prompts land reliably. [Salomon; DA] If My Conversations is misconfigured, recruiters may only get email prompts—verify dual routing in a tenant with mixed domain access. [Jira] HRREC-91975 (PH: Recruiter receives a notification): XO metadata search was attempted this session but the SUV search endpoint returned a transport error, so confirm REST tasks, conversation security domains, and sliding-panel bindings on a healthy SUV before sizing. [XO MCP]

🔵 Medium

  • Finding: HRREC-91975: In-app vs email prompt routing for inbound replies still depends on My Conversations domain work tracked thinly elsewhere in the epic.
  • Recommended next step: Pair with HRREC-92022 OE outcome so notification copy matches the actual entry path recruiters will use.

Scenario: Cross-surface parity (HRREC-91975)
Given related epic stories on reporting, purge, or notifications have shipped their contracts for this job application
When recruiters complete the journey described in HRREC-91975
Then timestamps, redaction, and notification entry points match sibling story promises without contradictory copy
HRREC-91978

Gap Likelihood from Verdict + column 7 only.

 Channel toggle should read as rollout control: document what recruiters still see mid-flight when admins flip the switch during drafts. [DA] Disabling while drafts are open could strand attachments mid-upload—capture slow-network timing in tests. [Jira] HRREC-91978 (PH: Admin can enable or disable 2-way email as a comms channel): XO metadata search was attempted this session but the SUV search endpoint returned a transport error, so confirm REST tasks, conversation security domains, and sliding-panel bindings on a healthy SUV before sizing.
